text:
The Piko (, Piko—base kanji lit. "Running Bird") is a large species of land bird used for riding and transportation of goods by the Kurta Clan. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Appearance

A Piko has a large feathered body, long neck, and large beak. They also have a large feather on the back of their head. In the Phantom Rouge movie, they have a red comb on their head, a smaller beak, and a wattle. They are each seen wearing a visor as well (in the manga, Kurapika's Piko is seen wearing a hat when he left his village). Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 They have the same appearance as the creature depicted on the cover of Volume 4 (see trivia below).

Behavior

Although little is known about the Piko's behavior, they seem to have been tamed by the Kurta Clan as they are obedient toward any member who rides them. 

Plot

Kurapika's Memories

Kurapika and Pairo take three Piko to complete their assigned task in Nancha City. Upon arriving at the city, they place their Piko at a local stable with other creatures until they finish their task. When they complete it, they ride the Piko back to their village as the other two carry the supplies they were tasked to purchase in the city. 

Having passed the final test, Kurapika rides on a Piko to journey to the outside world. 

Trivia

The species name is not mentioned in the Phantom Rouge movie.
On the cover of Volume 4, Kurapika is seen reclining and reading a book on a Piko that resembles those in the Phantom Rouge movie.
On the color page for Chapter 317, Kurapika is seen riding a creature resembling a Piko.
In both their general appearance and function, the Piko are similar to Chocobo from the Final Fantasy franchise.
